---
title: "appendix"
format:
    html: 
      theme: cosmo
      toc: false
    pdf:
      toc: false
---

# Usage of AI

1. I used AI to clarify how I can parse the dates in different formats.
![AI suggestion on how to use parse_date_time](images/1_AI_use.png)

2. I used AI to figure out if I would like to use boxplots, and if they are feasible.
![AI suggestion on how to use boxplot](images/2_AI_use.png)

3. Had a question on how to best sequence facet wrap with order geom functions.
![AI suggestion on facet_wrap()](images/3_AI_use.png)
